name: ap-monorepo
description: Ap penguin kiosk for cggalleries.com — root scripts that orchestrate /kiosk and /server

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix kiosk
scripts.build:pages: npm run build --prefix kiosk && node scripts/build-pages-config.mjs
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:pages && npx wrangler pages deploy kiosk/dist --project-name apa-v1
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix kiosk
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix kiosk
